justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple redundant API calls by repeatedly checking for 9 AM slots even after the user tried different times, and also repeated the same apology and suggestion multiple times.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was frustrating due to the agent's repetitive responses and inability to offer alternative solutions, making the user do all the work in finding an available slot.

overall_notes: The agent got stuck in a loop of checking specific times and dates provided by the user, without proactively suggesting alternative available slots or broader timeframes, leading to a very inefficient and frustrating experience for the user.
